title: Blog
text:

title: Interview: Mechanical Career Roadmap for Students
text: Our guest shared a simple roadmap: build project depth, communicate clearly, and stay close to real industry problems from the start.

title: Event Reflection: Industry Meetup in Phnom Penh
text: The meetup focused on practical job-readiness, industry expectations, and ways to build long-term engineering careers in Cambodia.

title: Building the Bridge Between Alumni and Youth
text: MEJC creates opportunities where alumni can share lessons that students rarely get from textbooks. Through regular events, students gain practical direction and stronger motivation.

title: About Us
text:
“My Engineering Journey Cambodia” is the program that promote activities in field Industrial and Mechanical Engineering in Cambodia by host the event and campaign making in order to share and spread incredible journey experiences to the young generation. MEJC is play the essential role as the bridge that connect alumni in the Industrial and Mechanical Engineering community, inspiring Cambodia’s youth.




We connect ITC alumni and current students through practical mentorship and networking activities.





We host interviews, webinars, and campaigns to make engineering careers visible and accessible.





We share real journey experiences that help young Cambodians imagine and pursue meaningful futures.

title: Campaign Spotlight: Inspiring Future Engineers
text: MEJC campaigns combine practical storytelling and mentorship touchpoints that help high school and university students explore engineering with clarity.

title: How MEJC Supports ITC Students Beyond the Classroom
text: From webinars to alumni mentorship, MEJC gives ITC students real context on how engineering education connects to field practice.

title: Webinar Recap: Smart Manufacturing in Cambodia
text: The webinar highlighted practical adoption paths for smart manufacturing in Cambodian industries, with clear first steps for students and young professionals.

title: My Engineering Journey Cambodia
text:
Inspiring Cambodia’s youth through Industrial and Mechanical Engineering stories, alumni connection, and practical events that turn ambition into real-world journeys.
